description: Stylish to the hilt, this classic bag from puma tops our wishlist this season! Pick one up and stay trendy! Height: 25 cm Width: 35 cm Depth: 7 cm Nylon upper with embroidered branding Two short handles One main zippered compartment with two pouches Fabric lining Care Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring Do not iron
